---
title: "Teaching Experience"
description-meta: "teaching experience"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---


<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}


## University of Washington

- [Certificate in Data Science Methods for Real-World Evidence in Health](https://sop.washington.edu/choice/graduate-education-training-programs/certificate-in-data-science-methods-for-real-world-evidence-in-health/) 
  - Teaching Assistant | School of Pharmacy | Autumn 2026, Winter 2027, Spring 2027 (Scheduled) | Leana de la Torre

- [Certificate in Health Economics, Health Technology Assessment, and Market Access](https://sop.washington.edu/choice/graduate-education-training-programs/certificate-in-health-economics-health-technology-assessment-and-market-access/)
  - Teaching Assistant | School of Pharmacy | Autumn 2026, Winter 2027, Spring 2027 (Scheduled) | Leana de la Torre

- Special topic lecture: Regression methods for health care cost and resource utilization
  - Teaching Assistant | School of Pharmacy | Jan 2026 | Prof. Anirban Basu & Prof. Noemi Kreif


<center><hr style="width:0%"></center>


## Others

- R Data Visualization at R Foundations and Introduction to R-HTA Modelling
  - Instructor | [R-HTA in LMICs](https://r-hta-in-lmics.github.io/) | April 2025


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
